content.description: Duo multi-factor authentication trends over time. Breaks down MFA success and failure rates by reason, authentication factor, device OS, and application.
content.eai:data:
<dashboard version="2" theme="light">
    <label>DUO: MFA Trends v2</label>
    <description>Duo multi-factor authentication trends over time. Breaks down MFA success and failure rates by reason, authentication factor, device OS, and application.</description>
    <definition><![CDATA[
{
	"title": "DUO: MFA Trends v2",
	"description": "Duo multi-factor authentication trends over time. Breaks down MFA success and failure rates by reason, authentication factor, device OS, and application.",
	"inputs": {
		"input_field": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "reason",
				"items": [
					{
						"label": "Reason",
						"value": "reason"
					},
					{
						"label": "Factor",
						"value": "factor"
					}
				],
				"token": "field"
			},
			"title": "Group By",
			"type": "input.dropdown"
		},
		"input_global_trp": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "-24h@h,now",
				"token": "global_time"
			},
			"title": "Global Time Range",
			"type": "input.timerange"
		},
		"input_os": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"items": [
					{
						"label": "All",
						"value": "*"
					},
					{
						"label": "Android",
						"value": "Android"
					},
					{
						"label": "Mac OS X",
						"value": "Mac OS X"
					},
					{
						"label": "Windows",
						"value": "Windows"
					},
					{
						"label": "iOS",
						"value": "iOS"
					}
				],
				"token": "os"
			},
			"title": "Select OS",
			"type": "input.dropdown"
		},
		"input_result": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "SUCCESS",
				"items": [
					{
						"label": "Success",
						"value": "SUCCESS"
					},
					{
						"label": "Failure",
						"value": "FAILURE"
					}
				],
				"token": "result"
			},
			"title": "Result",
			"type": "input.dropdown"
		},
		"input_username": {
			"options": {
				"defaultValue": "*",
				"token": "username"
			},
			"title": "Username (default: *)",
			"type": "input.text"
		}
	},
	"defaults": {
		"dataSources": {
			"ds.search": {
				"options": {
					"queryParameters": {
						"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
						"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
					}
				}
			}
		}
	},
	"visualizations": {
		"viz_apps": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_apps"
			},
			"options": {},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Applications",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_pie": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_breakdown"
			},
			"options": {},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Breakdown",
			"type": "splunk.pie"
		},
		"viz_table": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_breakdown"
			},
			"options": {},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Detail Table",
			"type": "splunk.table"
		},
		"viz_timechart": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_timechart"
			},
			"options": {},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "MFA Trends Over Time",
			"type": "splunk.column"
		},
		"viz_total": {
			"containerOptions": {},
			"dataSources": {
				"primary": "ds_total"
			},
			"showLastUpdated": false,
			"showProgressBar": false,
			"title": "Total MFA Events",
			"type": "splunk.singlevalue"
		}
	},
	"dataSources": {
		"ds_apps": {
			"name": "Top applications",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=duo result=\"$result$\" | search username=$username$ | search access_device.os=$os$ | stats count by integration | sort - count",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_breakdown": {
			"name": "Breakdown by field",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=duo result=\"$result$\" | search username=$username$ | search access_device.os=$os$ | stats count by $field$",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_timechart": {
			"name": "Timechart by field",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=duo result=\"$result$\" | search username=$username$ | search access_device.os=$os$ | timechart span=1m count by $field$",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		},
		"ds_total": {
			"name": "Total count",
			"options": {
				"query": "index=duo result=\"$result$\" | search username=$username$ | search access_device.os=$os$ | stats count AS total",
				"queryParameters": {
					"earliest": "$global_time.earliest$",
					"latest": "$global_time.latest$"
				}
			},
			"type": "ds.search"
		}
	},
	"layout": {
		"globalInputs": [
			"input_global_trp",
			"input_result",
			"input_field",
			"input_username",
			"input_os"
		],
		"layoutDefinitions": {
			"layout_1": {
				"options": {
					"display": "auto",
					"height": 960,
					"width": 2100
				},
				"structure": [
					{
						"item": "viz_timechart",
						"position": {
							"h": 450,
							"w": 1260,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_pie",
						"position": {
							"h": 450,
							"w": 630,
							"x": 0,
							"y": 460
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_apps",
						"position": {
							"h": 450,
							"w": 620,
							"x": 640,
							"y": 460
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_total",
						"position": {
							"h": 190,
							"w": 570,
							"x": 1270,
							"y": 0
						},
						"type": "block"
					},
					{
						"item": "viz_table",
						"position": {
							"h": 710,
							"w": 570,
							"x": 1270,
							"y": 200
						},
						"type": "block"
					}
				],
				"type": "absolute"
			}
		},
		"tabs": {
			"items": [
				{
					"label": "MFA Trends",
					"layoutId": "layout_1"
				}
			]
		}
	}
}
    ]]></definition>
    <meta type="hiddenElements"><![CDATA[
{
	"hideEdit": false,
	"hideOpenInSearch": false,
	"hideExport": false
}
    ]]></meta>
</dashboard>
content.label: DUO: MFA Trends v2
